mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of Elizabeth Keith
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of Elizabeth Keith Jackson Maberry, Administrator H.P. Sutphin, Brother Bird Sutphin, Brother R. Sutphin, Brother Eli Sutphin, Brother Martha Sutphin, Sister Riley Sutphin, Brother Recorded in Ledger Book 5 page 73, in the Floyd County Courthouse. Date recorded as August 16th, 1899 term
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
